why_used: Shows why raw accuracy is misleading under class imbalance.
Interpretable weighted baseline for directional linear signal.
main_limitation: Cannot model non-linear feature interactions well.

why_used: Captures threshold rules and gives a simple tree-based comparison.
main_limitation: Can be unstable; depth is constrained to reduce overfitting.

why_used: Averages many class-balanced trees and performed best by validation not-merged F1.
main_limitation: Impurity importance is not causal and can favor high-cardinality/continuous features.

why_used: Sequentially improves weak learners with class-balanced sample weights.
main_limitation: Higher recall/AP in some diagnostics but lower declared primary F1 than the selected model.

why_used: Groups PRs by feature similarity without using the target.
main_limitation: Assumes compact clusters and is sensitive to scaling.

why_used: Projects high-dimensional cluster features into two dimensions for inspection.
main_limitation: Two components explain only part of the transformed variance.
